prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次依次约 13474→13536→13965→12988→13740，整体在 13000–14000 区间波动，2025 年基准约 13740 名；近 5 年无明显单边趋势，2024 年曾回升至 12988 名后 2025 年又回落，波动幅度约 1000 名；该校在福建省物理类计划 2021 年 68 人、2022 年 75 人、2023 年 70 人、2024 年 73 人、2025 年 79 人，呈逐步扩招态势；2026 年计划 85 人，较 2025 年再扩招 6 人（+7.6%），扩招幅度较大，对竞争压力有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校；软科中国大学排名从 2021 年第 76 名持续上升至 2026 年第 69 名，排名稳步提升，反映综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有所提升；2022 年曾出现教师学术不端负面事件，近年声誉平稳；抖音综合热度排名第 75（评价"一般"），短视频平台曝光量处于中等偏下水平，未见明显报考关注升温信号；无投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中作物学、植物保护、畜牧学、草学 4 个学科获评 A-，在农林领域具有显著学科优势，对应招生专业（农学类、植物保护、动物医学类、草业科学等）对相关方向考生有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息 /通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续高热，该校计算机类、电子信息工程等专业录取位次常年居前，带动整体报考热度；福建省物理类考生从 2021 年 11.7 万增至 2025 年 19.2 万，2026 年估算约 20.4 万，考生规模持续扩大，竞争基数上升；省控线（本科批）2025 年 441 分，较 2024 年 449 分略降，卷面难度变化不大；该校位于陕西咸阳，属西北地区，对东南沿海福建考生存在一定地域距离偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2026 年大幅扩招（+7.6%）缓解竞争、软科排名持续上升增强吸引力、福建省物理类考生持续增加（+6.1%）加剧竞争等多重因素，扩招效应略大于考生增加效应，但排名上升吸引更多 高分考生关注，预计 2026 年最低位次较 2025 年基准 13740 名小幅后移至约 14336 名，波动区间 13836–14836 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 13474→13536→13965→12988→13740, fluctuating within the 13000–14000 range, with a 2025 baseline of about 13740; no clear unilateral trend in the past 5 years, with a rebound to 12988 in 2024 followed by a decline in 2025, a fluctuation range of about 1000 places; the university's enrollment plan in Fujian for Physics Category was 68 in 2021, 75 in 2022, 70 in 2023, 73 in 2024, and 79 in 2025, showing a gradual expansion; the 2026 plan is 85, an increase of 6 students (+7.6%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion that somewhat alleviates competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has steadily risen from 76th in 2021 to 69th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates; a negative incident of academic misconduct by a teacher occurred in 2022, but reputation has been stable in recent years; its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 75th (rated 'average'), with short video platform exposure at a medium-low level, showing no significant signs of increased application interest; no records of enrollment gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, four disciplines—Crop Science, Plant Protection, Animal Husbandry, and Grassland Science—received A- ratings, demonstrating significant disciplinary advantages in agriculture and forestry, with corresponding enrollment majors (Agricultural Sciences, Plant Protection, Veterinary Medicine, Grassland Science, etc.) having stable appeal to candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering remain highly popular in society, with the university's Computer Science and Electronic Information Engineering majors consistently ranking high in admission rankings, driving overall application enthusiasm; the number of Physics Category candidates in Fujian increased from 117,000 in 2021 to 192,000 in 2025, with an estimated 204,000 in 2026, a continuous expansion of the candidate pool and rising competition base; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) was 441 in 2025, slightly down from 449 in 2024, with little change in exam difficulty; the university is located in Xianyang, Shaanxi, in the northwest region, which may have some geographical distance preference impact on candidates from the southeastern coastal Fujian.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+7.6%) alleviating competition, the steady rise in Soft Science rankings enhancing attractiveness, and the continuous increase in Physics Category candidates in Fujian (+6.1%) intensifying competition, the expansion effect slightly outweighs the candidate increase effect, but the rising rankings attract more high-scoring candidates. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 13740 to approximately 14336, with a fluctuation range of 13836–14836.

- Electronic Information Engineering
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics
- Mechanical Engineering (including Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Mechanical and Electronic Engineering, Vehicle Engineering).

- Smart Agriculture.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Business Administration (including Accounting, Business Administration, Agricultural and Forestry Economics and Management, Land Resource Management, Marketing).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 13836–14836, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choices (Agricultural Sciences, Veterinary Medicine, Food Science, and other agriculture-forestry specialty majors have strong disciplinary strength), with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Horticulture, Grassland Science, Landscape Architecture, etc.) as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<13800), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular engineering majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年历史类最低位次依次约 2122→2077→2234→2060→2495，整体在 2000–2500 区间波动，2025 年基准约 2495 名，为近 5 年最高（位次数字最大），显示竞争有所缓和；该校在福建省历史类计划 2021 年 12 人、2022 年 9 人、2023–2025 年均为 8 人，呈小幅缩减后稳定；2026 年计划仍为 8 人，与 2025 年持平，无扩缩招变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校；软科排名持续上升至 2026 年第 69 名，综合实力稳步增强；近年声誉平稳，无明显负面舆情；抖音热度一般，未出现报考关注异常升温信号；作物学、植物保护、畜牧学、草学 4 个 A- 学科，但历史类招生专业（法学、社会学类、英语、公共管理类）与农林优势学科关联度较低，学科吸引力对文科考生有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学社会热度偏热（推荐） ，社会学类、公共管理类热度一般，英语专业热度一般观望；福建省历史类考生从 2021 年 7.8 万降至 2024 年 5.7 万后回升至 2025 年 6.0 万，2026 年估算约 6.4 万，考生规模小幅回升；省控线（本科批）2025 年 450 分，较 2024 年 431 分上升 19 分，竞争门槛有所提高；该校位于陕西，对福建文科考生存在一定地域距离影响，但 985 层次仍具吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2026 年招生计划持平、福建省历史类考生小幅增加（+6.2%）、省控线上升等因素，竞争环境略有收紧；软科排名上升对整体吸引力有正向作用，但文科专业与该校优势学科关联度低 。预计 2026 年最低位次较 2025 年基准 2495 名略前移至约 2480 名，波动区间 2034–2926 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 历史类招生专业仅 4 个，位次在预测区间 2034–2926 名内，建议以法学为冲刺目标（社会热度高），社会学类和英语作为稳妥选择，公共管理类作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<2034 名）可重点冲刺法学专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2122→2077→2234→2060→2495, fluctuating within the 2000–2500 range. The 2025 baseline is about 2495, the highest in the past 5 years (largest ranking number), indicating eased competition. The university's enrollment plan in Fujian for History Category was 12 students in 2021, 9 in 2022, and 8 from 2023 to 2025, showing a slight reduction then stabilization. The 2026 plan remains at 8 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science ranking has steadily risen to 69th in 2026, with continuously strengthening comprehensive strength. Its reputation has been stable in recent years with no significant negative public opinion. Douyin popularity is average, with no abnormal surge in application interest. It has four A- disciplines: Crop Science, Plant Protection, Animal Science, and Grass Science, but the History Category majors (Law, Sociology, English, Public Administration) have low relevance to its agricultural strengths, limiting appeal to liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially popular (recommended), Sociology and Public Administration are average, and English is average with caution. The number of History Category examinees in Fujian dropped from 78,000 in 2021 to 57,000 in 2024, then rebounded to 60,000 in 2025, estimated at 64,000 in 2026, a slight increase. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) in 2025 was 450 points, up 19 points from 431 in 2024, raising the competition threshold. The university is located in Shaanxi, which has a certain geographical distance impact on Fujian liberal arts examinees, but its 985 status remains attractive.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a slight increase in Fujian History Category examinees (+6.2%), and a rise in the provincial control line, the competition environment is slightly tightening. The rising Soft Science ranking positively impacts overall appeal, but the liberal arts majors have low relevance to the university's strengths. The 2026 minimum ranking is expected to shift slightly forward from the 2025 baseline of 2495 to about 2480, with a fluctuation range of 2034–2926.

Tier 2 (Moderate)

- English (language).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: There are only 4 majors in History Category, with rankings within the predicted range of 2034–2926. It is recommended to aim for Law as a sprint target (high social popularity), choose Sociology and English as stable options, and use Public Administration as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<2034), focus on sprinting for the Law major.
